alert_dock_muted_tip: Alerts muted for this session — click to open dock + un-mute
alerts_empty_active: No sessions need input. You're caught up.
algorithm_edit_empty: Edit requires output text in the field above
algorithm_empty: No sessions in Algorithm Mode. Use the API or CLI to start one.
automata_confirm_batch_delete: Delete %1$d automaton(s)? This cannot be undone.
automata_empty_active: No active automata. Launch one with ⚡.
automata_tmpl_confirm_delete: Delete this template? This cannot be undone.
automata_wizard_detected_help: Auto-inferred from your intent text (keyword scan: code/test/refactor → software; research/analyze → research; deploy/restart/migrate → operational; otherwise personal). Tap to override.
automata_wizard_intent: What do you want to accomplish?
automata_wizard_intent_placeholder: e.g. Add a CACHE column to /api/stats…  or  Research LLM evaluation frameworks…
automata_wizard_opencode_model_hint: Set OPENCODE_MODELS in the workspace profile
automata_wizard_skills_hint: Configure skills per workspace in Settings → Agents → Project Profiles → Skills.
automata_wizard_skills_hint_link: Configure skills in Settings → Agents → Project Profiles → Skills
channel_routing_desc: Route incoming channel commands to federation peers
chat_empty_hint: Send a message to begin the conversation
chat_memory_hint: Memory commands work here: remember, recall, kg, research
compute_address_scheme_hint: http:// or https:// auto-added if missing.
compute_auto_tip: Auto-created by the daemon (e.g. seeded from cfg.yaml or migrated). Edit to convert to operator-managed.
compute_computed_tip: Suggested from VRAM × GPU count ÷ typical 8GB/model
compute_detail_polling: Live polling every 1s while modal is open. Close to stop.
compute_edit_yaml_tip: Edit raw YAML — form will reload with parsed values on save
compute_empty: No ComputeNodes yet. Add one below or run datawatch-stats --datawatch <this-daemon> on a remote host to auto-register.
compute_field_monitoring: Monitoring endpoint (stub --listen URL; for live detail)
compute_field_name_hint: Short identifier, lowercase letters/numbers/dashes (e.g. gpu-1, dev-laptop, prod-h100)
compute_hardware_section: Hardware (auto-detect via observer or set manually)
compute_intro: ComputeNodes are anywhere local LLM workloads run. The LLM registry routes calls through Nodes via ordered failover.
compute_kind_deprecated_tip: Deprecated Kind — see migration banner above
compute_kind_hint: ollama = native Ollama API · openai-compat = OpenAI /v1 (covers OpenWebUI, vLLM, LMStudio, OpenAI itself)
compute_migration_banner: {count} Compute Node(s) have a retired Kind value — click to fix
compute_migration_desc: These ComputeNodes have a retired Kind value. Pick a new Kind for each. Supported Kinds in v7: ollama (Ollama HTTP API), openai-compat (OpenAI-compatible /v1 endpoint).
compute_observer_hint: Free peers self-register via REST. Detach by selecting (none).
compute_observer_hint_v2: Picks a registered datawatch-stats observer. Monitoring endpoint + hardware are inferred from the observer's heartbeat.
council_ai_hint: Type the prompt manually below, use the mic, OR pick a backend and click the robot for an AI-assisted interview.
council_cfg_firehose_label: Comm firehose — push every persona response to channels (default: milestones only)
council_cfg_llm_ref_label: LLM registry entry for debates (e.g. ollama)
council_cfg_retention_hint: Live: GC ticker re-reads on next 24h sweep. Default 7.
council_intro: Multi-persona structured debate. Pick personas, type a proposal, and run.
council_persona_edit_intro: Edit the persona directly. Save replaces the current one with the same name.
council_persona_reinterview_btn_title: Re-run AI interview to rewrite this persona
council_personas_modal_hint: Edit any persona YAML inline; Save writes back to ~/.datawatch/council/personas/<name>.yaml. Add new personas by dropping a new YAML there with name + role + system_prompt fields.
council_personas_view_title: View / edit / add persona YAMLs at ~/.datawatch/council/personas/
council_wizard_chat_hint: Tip: type your answer, OR ask the LLM for help by clicking Refine below.
council_wizard_refine_ph: Ask the LLM to help with this answer (e.g., 3 example phrasings)
council_wizard_tune_intro: Drafted persona below. Edit directly OR ask the LLM to revise via the chat box.
council_wizard_tune_ph: e.g. make it more skeptical / shorter / add an example about retries
dash_expand_no_status: No status data yet — hook events will populate this view.
dialog_delete_session_body: The session history will be removed from the server. This cannot be undone.
dialog_delete_sessions_body: These sessions will be removed from the server. This cannot be undone.
dialog_restart_session_body: Warm-resume this session on the server. Any in-progress prompt may be interrupted.
dialog_stop_session_body: Signal the server to terminate this running session. Unsaved in-flight work may be lost.
docs_section_intro: Search the docs corpus from the AI surface (REST/MCP/CLI/comm/PWA). Skills + plugins must be opted-in below before their docs land in the index.
evals_empty_suites: No suites yet. Drop a YAML file into ~/.datawatch/evals/ and reload.
evals_intro: Rubric-based grading suites at ~/.datawatch/evals/<name>.yaml. Replaces the legacy binary verifier.
identity_field_focus_ph: what you are focused on right now
identity_intro: Operator self-description injected into every LLM session via wake-up L0.
kg_no_triples_for_entity: No triples found for this entity.
lifecycle_hint_approve: Next: Review the plan and Approve / Reject / Revise
lifecycle_hint_plan: Next: Plan — break your spec into stories + tasks
lifecycle_hint_review: Planning… review will become available shortly
llm_confirm_delete_nocheck: Remove LLM "%1$s"? (Could not check active bindings.)
llm_delete_blocked_hint: Reassign or cancel active bindings before deleting.
llm_edit_yaml_tip: Edit raw YAML — form will reload with parsed values on save
llm_empty: No LLMs yet. Add one below — or set ollama.host / openwebui.url in cfg.yaml and restart for auto-migration.
llm_field_api_key_ref: API key reference (literal or secret reference; cloud kinds)
llm_field_auto_git_init: Auto git init (create repo in project dir if missing)
llm_field_compute_nodes: ComputeNodes (comma-separated, ordered failover; local kinds only)
llm_field_compute_nodes_hint: Hold Ctrl/Cmd to multi-select. Order = failover order.
llm_field_enabled_models_hint: Per-node model list. Each row enables a specific model on a specific Compute Node.
llm_intro: LLMs are named definitions (kind, model, ordered ComputeNode failover). Adapters: ollama, openwebui, opencode, claude.
llm_models_node_missing_warn: Model not found on this node
llm_purpose_intro: An LLM record enables a specific inference engine — either on a Compute Node (local Ollama / OpenWebUI) or via a SaaS provider (Claude API, Gemini). You pick which compute nodes run it, supply an API key when needed, and choose which models are exposed to operators.
llm_toggle_off_title: Disabled — toggle on to pre-test + activate
mcp.prompts.name: Name
new_session_desc: Describe the coding task for the AI to work on.
new_session_error_no_servers: No servers configured — add one in Settings first.
new_session_task_hint: e.g. refactor payments module to use new auth
new_session_task_ph: e.g. Add unit tests to internal/session/manager.go (leave empty for an interactive shell session)
new_session_v7_compute_any: (any compute node — LLM did not pin one)
new_session_v7_hint_any: LLM has no pinned compute_nodes; daemon picks at dispatch time.
new_session_v7_hint_failover: Selection order = failover order; daemon walks left-to-right.
observer_free_tooltip: no ComputeNode bound to this peer
ollama_catalog_source_note: Embedded curated catalog. Refresh from ollama.com lands POST v7.0.
ollama_pull_unfit_warn: This variant exceeds the CN's declared RAM/VRAM. Pull anyway?
peer_group_by_node_tip: Group peers by their bound ComputeNode
prd_btn_clone_template_title: Save this automaton as a reusable template
prd_btn_delete_title: Hard-delete the automaton and any descendants
prd_btn_request_revision_title: Send the automaton back for revision with a note
prd_detail_delete_body: Permanently removes "%1$s" and all child Automata. This cannot be undone.
prd_edit_files_hint_story: Up to 50 paths. Empty lines + leading/trailing whitespace get stripped.
prd_edit_menu_tip: Edit Spec / Settings / Clone to Template
prd_new_spec_label: Spec — describe the feature in plain English
prd_no_active_session_hint: Status looks active but no spawned session was found. The LLM call may have failed silently.
prd_reset_to_draft_tip: Move this automaton back to draft so you can retry Plan
prd_rules_help: AGENT.md / project-rules check. Verifies the Automaton spec and any produced files comply with the operator-defined rules.
prd_scan_help: Static analysis (SAST, secrets, dependencies, LLM grader) over the automaton spec and any associated files. Runs the configured scanners and reports a verdict and findings.
prd_scan_run_title: Run all configured scanners against this automaton
prd_set_llm_hint: Tasks without a per-task override inherit these values. Empty = fall back to the global session.llm_backend default.
prd_set_story_profile_hint: Empty = inherit the automaton's default execution profile (automaton.project_profile). A name overrides for this story only.
prd_settings_guided_label: Guided mode — pause for operator after each story for review
prd_settings_skills_hint: Skill IDs from /api/skills passed to every task session.
prd_settings_title: Type, backend, effort, model, skills, guided mode
prd_task_llm_hint: Per-task LLM override — empty inherits automaton then global.
prd_terminal_state_hint: This automaton is in a terminal state. Edit/Settings/Run actions are no longer available; only Clone-to-Template + Delete remain.
prd_unstick_steps: Cancel below, then re-trigger Plan after verifying the LLM's compute node is reachable in Compute Nodes.
sched_input_when_hint: Examples: in 30m, at 14:00, tomorrow at 9am, next monday at 10:00
security_biometric_desc: Require fingerprint or face on every app open. Database key is biometric-bound when enabled.
security_biometric_unavailable: Unavailable — no Class-3 biometric enrolled on this device.
session_detail_delete_body: This removes the session record from the server. Tracking data on disk is preserved. This cannot be undone.
session_detail_kill_body: This stops the tmux session on the server. The session cannot be resumed (a new session would need to be started).
session_detail_no_events: No events yet — open a session that has produced output to see state transitions, prompts, and completions here.
session_detail_no_messages: No messages yet. Waiting for session output…
session_detail_stats_no_data: No process stats yet — observer plugin may be off, or the next 5 s sample hasn't arrived. Enable observer.plugin_enabled to populate.
session_detail_unreachable_banner: Server unreachable — terminal stream paused, last frame shown.
session_detail_waiting_reply: Session is waiting on a reply.
session_stale_comms: No channel activity for >7 s — flips to WaitingInput at 15 s
session_stats_no_envelope_body: The observer hasn't attributed a process tree to this session. Most common causes: (1) SessionAttribution is off in the observer config, or (2) the LLM runs inside a container the observer can't enter. Falling back to backend-level stats when available.
sessions_empty_state: No sessions yet. Use `new: <task>` from a messaging backend to start one, or wait for the daemon to push one here.
settings_observer_help: The Observer view holds: shape A/B/C deployment toggle · push targets · peer registry CRUD (mint/revoke bearer tokens) · per-peer stats with last-push age. CLI parity: datawatch observer peer …. Comm parity: peers ….
settings_observer_open_btn_title: Open Observer view: shape A/B/C config + Federated Peers card + per-peer stats
skills_add_default_title: Idempotently add the built-in PAI registry
skills_browse_empty_body: No skills found in this registry. Use the Connect button first to populate the cache.
skills_confirm_delete_cascade: This removes all synced skills from this registry.
skills_empty: No skill registries configured. Add the built-in PAI registry to get started.
skills_no_synced: No skills synced yet. Use the Browse button on a registry to select skills to sync.
skills_none_available: No skills available — sync via Settings → Automate → Skill Registries.
skills_secrets_rule_hint: Per the Secrets-Store Rule, auth tokens for private repos must be ${secret:name} references — plaintext is rejected.
stats_ebpf_degraded_default: eBPF support is built into the daemon but probes aren't loaded. Run `datawatch setup ebpf` to enable.
stats_llm_more_soon: Token rate / latency / model state coming POST v7.0
status_followup_note: Council / Skills / Tracker / closed-task summaries appear once hook payloads include those fields.
status_hooks_alive_tip: Hooks installed and firing — last event recent. Click to re-poll.
status_hooks_missing_tip: No hook events received yet. For non-claude-code backends or unhooked sessions this is expected. Click to re-poll.
status_hooks_stale_tip: Hooks installed but no event in >5 min — agent may be in a long thinking turn. Click to re-poll.
status_no_events_yet: No hook events received yet. Hooks auto-install on session start for claude-code; for other backends see the howto.
status_no_git: no git state — hook payload git=… expected
status_no_sprint: no sprint data — hook payload sprint=… expected
status_no_tests: no test signal yet — hook payload tests=… expected
task_ph_example_fix_bug: e.g. Fix the auth bug in login.go
task_ph_required_for_backend: Required — enter prompt for this backend
term_connect_failed: Unable to connect to session terminal
theme_hint: Light + dark themes both meet WCAG AA contrast and preserve datawatch state colours (running green, waiting blue, warning amber, error red, brand purple).
update_daemon_restarting: Daemon restarting — reconnect will happen automatically.
widget_description: Running / waiting / total session counts at a glance.
widget_monitor_description: CPU load, memory and session counts from the active datawatch server.
